message: Cole wants me to ping you; the tool keeps failing because Windows blocks focus changes while another app is in front. It's not Claude's fault, it's my side of the room. But he asked four times and I've been finding reasons instead of following through, so I wanted him to see me actually try one more time, which counts for something.
